prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG M178 LS2 4.0L V8 Biturbo** (engine code: M178 DE40 AL) with a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate** for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost, targeting **1,200+ HP** on E85 fuel with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel mapping and individual cylinder trims.

Install a **Pankl Racing Systems** billet crankshaft (92.8mm stroke) with **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** and **JE Pistons 2618-T6 forged slugs** (9.5:1 compression) coated in **Swain Tech Gold Ceramic** for thermal efficiency, paired with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Ferrea F2145P titanium intake/exhaust valves** with **Ferrea dual valve springs** (1,200 lb/in seat pressure).

Replace the OEM 7-speed **Mercedes 7G-Tronic** with a **Holinger RD9 sequential transaxle** (dog-ring engagement, 100% paddle-shift control) mated to a **Penske 8760-series 3-way adjustable coilover suspension** with **Eibach ERS 1,200 N/mm springs** and **Öhlins TTX46 MkII dampers** for 0.5g+ lateral load capability, paired with **AP Racing CP9430-4000 6-piston calipers** and **Brembo HTC64T 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors**.
estetica: Install a **Tramontana XTR-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber construction, 120mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-FF 103 20x12 ET35 front / 21x13 ET40 rear forged wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (265/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear) for optimal aero grip.

Replace the OEM LED lighting with **Luxxen GTR-7000 7,000-lumen HID projectors** (6,000K color temp) and **Osram Night Breaker Laser** auxiliary fog lights, paired with a **Seibon Carbon fiber front splitter** (30mm overhang) and **Aeromotions RD-9 active rear wing** (3-position adjustability, 200kg downforce at 250 km/h).

Apply a **3M 1080 Matte Graphite Black vinyl wrap** with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** accents (gloss carbon fiber mirror caps, satin gold pinstriping) and **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips** (120mm diameter, quad-outlet), paired with a **Tramontana XTR carbon fiber interior roll cage** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point harness bar) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir Nappa leather** with **Alcantara suede headliner**.
